en_title: Stellar Blade Bloodrain Revealed With Debut Trailer
cn_title: 《剑星》续作《剑星：血雨》正式公布
subtitle: 新篇章开启
opus_summary: Shift Up在夏日游戏节公布《剑星》续作《剑星：血雨》及首支预告。该作由Shift Up新发行部门独立发行，不再由索尼互动娱乐负责，将登陆Xbox Series、PC及PS5。游戏仍处早期开发。

paragraphs.en: Shift Up has announced a Stellar Blade sequel, Stellar Blade Blood Rain, alongside a debut trailer at Summer Game Fest 2026.
paragraphs.cn: Shift Up 在 2026 年夏日游戏节上公布了《剑星》续作《剑星：血雨》，并放出了首支预告片。

paragraphs.en: The sequel to the hit 2024 action adventure game will be published by Shift Up’s new publishing division. The first Stellar Blade was published by Sony Interactive Entertainment as a PlayStation 5 exclusive, before it made its way to PC a year later. Shift Up’s decision to go it alone means Stellar Blade 2 can launch on Xbox Series X and S as well as PC and PS5.
paragraphs.cn: 这款 2024 年热门动作冒险游戏的续作将由 Shift Up 的新发行部门负责发行。初代《剑星》由索尼互动娱乐作为 PS5 独占游戏发行，一年后才登陆 PC。Shift Up 决定独立发行，意味着《剑星2》将登陆 Xbox Series X/S、PC 和 PS5 平台。

paragraphs.en: Tonight's showing came with the caveat that the game was still early in development, so don't expect it to arrive anytime soon.
paragraphs.cn: 今晚的展示附带了一个说明：游戏仍处于早期开发阶段，所以不要指望它很快就能发售。

paragraphs.en: " Stellar Blade: Blood Rain marks the next chapter in the acclaimed action-adventure franchise being developed by the original team," reads an official blurb. "Set in the same universe as Stellar Blade, the next installment continues the story beyond the events of the first game, introducing new protagonist Evie and expanding the world in a bold new direction.
paragraphs.cn: 官方简介写道：「《剑星：血雨》标志着这款备受赞誉的动作冒险系列开启了新篇章，由原班人马开发。新作与《剑星》设定在同一个宇宙，故事延续初代事件之后，引入新主角 Evie，并以大胆的新方向拓展世界。」

paragraphs.en: "While the project is still in early development, Shift Up has made incredible progress and is looking forward to sharing more details when ready. The team is hard focused on building upon the stylish action, world-building, and core elements that fans have adored from Stellar Blade, while evolving the universe in ambitious new ways."
paragraphs.cn: 「尽管项目仍处于早期开发阶段，但 Shift Up 已取得惊人进展，并期待在准备好后分享更多细节。团队正全力打磨《剑星》粉丝喜爱的时尚动作、世界构建和核心元素，同时以雄心勃勃的新方式拓展宇宙。」

paragraphs.en: Here's everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 if you need a catch up on what the video game industry has in store.
paragraphs.cn: 如果你想了解游戏行业的最新动态，这里汇总了 2026 年夏日游戏节公布的所有内容。

paragraphs.en: Wesley is Director, News at IGN. Find him on Twitter at @wyp100. You can reach Wesley at wesley_yinpoole@ign.com or confidentially at wyp100@proton.me.
paragraphs.cn: Wesley 是 IGN 新闻总监。你可以在 X 上通过 @wyp100 找到他。联系方式：wesley_yinpoole@ign.com，或保密邮箱 wyp100@proton.me。
